channel.title: Early Development & Activity Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Early Development & Activity Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions Early Development Activity Learning Toys 23 Coloured Building Bricks and 4 Characters Easter Treat Gifts for Toddlers & Kids 18 Months Old Plus 10415
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions Early Development Activity Learning Toys 23 Coloured Building Bricks and 4 Characters Easter Treat Gifts for Toddlers & Kids 18 Months Old Plus 10415 with a discount here: ℹ️: Creative learning toys – By stacking the coloured bricks, kids match or contrast the figures then choose how they feel with the expression bricks Stacking toy – Comes with 23 bricks, including 8 facial expressions and 4 wig bricks so it’s endlessly customisable and keeps playtimes fresh Gift for preschool boys and girls – This early development and activity toy Makes a fun birthday or Easter gift for toddlers and kids aged 18 months plus Toddler learning toys – LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions has 4 expressive characters to teach kids 18 months plus about different moods Building fine motor skills – The character toys come with coloured wigs in interesting shapes that are fun for curious little fingers to explore 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck Bin Lorry Toy Learning and Colour Sorting Toys for 2+ Year old Toddlers and Kids Develop Fine Motor Skills Set 10987
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck Bin Lorry Toy Learning and Colour Sorting Toys for 2+ Year old Toddlers and Kids Develop Fine Motor Skills Set 10987 here: ℹ️: Children develop their fine motor skills and get familiar with colours as they open and close the toy bins to tidy away the colour-matching bricks This activity-packed colour sorting truck toy makes a fab birthday or any-day gift for toddlers and kids aged 2+ who love drivable vehicles Help your toddler keep the streets tidy with the LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck toy for 2+ year olds, which teaches about colour matching The drivable bin lorry toy features a tipping function and comes with 3 colourful sorting toy bins with hinged lids to teach kids about recycling A great learning toy for toddlers; the set also includes a refuse worker LEGO DUPLO figure with a broom and a puppy toy animal figure 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO My First Organic Market Fruit and Vegetables Toy Food Set Learn Numbers Stacking Educational Toys for Toddlers 18 Months - 3 Years Old 10983
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO My First Organic Market Fruit and Vegetables Toy Food Set Learn Numbers Stacking Educational Toys for Toddlers 18 Months - 3 Years Old 10983 with a discount here: ℹ️: Encourages interactive play between toddlers and grown-ups as they role-play the customer or the stallholder selling fruit and vegetable toys This educational learning toy for toddlers aged 1.5 - 3 years old features fruit and vegetable stacking toys, scales, 3 coins and a fabric tote Toddlers can weigh the toy food with the scales, pay with the coins in different values, then take their toy shop home in a textile tote bag This LEGO DUPLO educational learning toy helps toddlers to recognise numbers, hone their balance skills and learn about healthy food as they play Includes toy food: watermelon, lemon, radish and strawberry, with different fun expressions; kids can learn about balance as they stack the toys 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO My First Organic Garden Brick Box Stacking Toys for Babies and Toddlers 1.5+ Years Old Learning Toy with Ladybird Bumblebee Fruit & Veg Easter Gift Idea 10984
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DUPLO My First Organic Garden Brick Box Stacking Toys for Babies and Toddlers 1.5+ Years Old Learning Toy with Ladybird Bumblebee Fruit & Veg Easter Gift Idea 10984 here: ℹ️: Give this colourful stacking toy for toddlers aged 18 months plus as a fun Easter gift, birthday present or special occasion treat Versatile LEGO DUPLO set helps develop children’s self-expression and fine motor skills as they enjoy endless creative fun playing the garden Also includes ladybird, bee and caterpillar toys, plus a beehive, trees, flowers, rain-cloud, rainbow bricks and a watering can for kids to use Teach babies and toddlers aged 1.

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia 10974 Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures Plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia 10974 Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures Plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5 at the following link: ℹ️: LEGO DUPLO set features adult and baby elephant, tiger and panda animal toys, 2 red pandas, a monkey, 2 birds plus bamboo and cherry blossom trees Kids can place the pandas in the trees, play with the animal toys on the slide, swing the monkey on the vine and take a walk with the elephants LEGO DUPLO early development and activity toys for toddlers make fab birthday or Christmas gifts for boys and girls ages 2 plus years old This educational toy for toddlers and kids age 2-5 includes 11 animal figures and realistic sounds, so kids can explore Asian wildlife Treat a little explorer to other LEGO DUPLO animal sets: Wild Animals of South America (10973) and Wild Animals of Africa (10971) This fun packed animal toy building set with LEGO DUPLO Bricks helps to develop kids language, social, cognitive and fine motor skills Includes a foldable, 3-dimensional playmat and a sound brick that plays realistic noises & animal sounds for interactive adventure playtime 🛒 Check the deal!
